title: Brewster's Millions
writer: George Barr McCutcheon, Winchell Smith, Byron Ongley
actors: Roscoe 'Fatty' Arbuckle, Betty Ross Clarke, Fred Huntley
plot: Monte Brewster learns that he has inherited $10 million from his late grandfather, but then learns that he must spend $2 million in less than a year and remain unmarried to inherit the rest of the money.
